algorithm_check.note: Video mode uses a two-pass flow with question-routed Tiny/Light/Medium/Full/Dense anchor policies, continuous tubelet storyboards, task-aware scene/motion/OCR evidence extraction, and per-record input audits before API calls; SiliconFlow extracts compact evidence, then Bailian Qwen verifies it against compressed video/tubelet/crop/transcript anchors for final answering.
